title: hieracium incisum subsp. villosipes
intro: Hieracium incisum subsp. villosipes, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium incisum subsp. villosipes include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its potential to act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Hieracium incisum subsp. villosipes can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
